offer: For home service technicians processing 10–20 jobs/week, inefficient scheduling causes missed appointments. We optimize scheduling instead of manual scheduling via phone or paper.
problem: inefficient scheduling leads to missed appointments and increased travel time.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for home service technicians
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on scheduling tools
DM outreach to home service technicians with demo video
Share insights in community forums for service technicians
try_it: Let users try drag-and-drop scheduling and job status updates.
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the scheduling process
Conduct 10 interviews with target users for feedback
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as user-friendly templates
Set default reminder schedules for efficiency
Allow CSV import for existing client data
Enable one-click export of job reports
